terminal_state_authority.merge_through_rule: Merge-through is allowed only after local proof, GitHub checks green, forbidden work touched is NO, and the PR receipt records the source-truth closeout and terminal state.

required_browser_proof: Not required for this seam. Live proof is runner-fire plus Slack chat.postMessage evidence on a real intervention, with quiet and dedup staying silent.

stop_condition: Stop when #262 has a PR with proof for intervention, quiet no-op, and dedup suppression, plus a receipt posted to issue #262; or stop BLOCKED with the exact missing Vercel envs required for the live Slack loop.
browser_proof_command: Non-owner account sign-up + connector + card + action — manual proof required
